name: HVT: Assassination
objective: Spend a Short Skill while the enemy HVT is in Line of Fire (LoF) and Zone of Control (ZoC), and pass a WIP Roll.
bonus: +3 MOD to WIP if in Silhouette contact with the HVT.

name: Vigilance
objective: Be inside the ZoC of an enemy trooper who is entirely in the enemy half of the table, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll.
bonus: +3 MOD if the trooper has LoF to the enemy.

name: Suspected Infiltration
objective: Be in Silhouette contact with an enemy trooper (excluding REM or TAG), spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll with a -3 MOD.
note: Can be completed via Peripheral (Servant) without the modifier.

name: Predator
objective: During the game, put at least two enemy troopers into the Unconscious or Dead state using CC Attacks.

name: Telemetry
objective: Make a successful Forward Observer or Spotlight roll against an enemy trooper.

name: HVT: Designation
objective: Make two successful Forward Observer or Spotlight rolls against a single enemy HVT model.

name: Data Scan
objective: Spend a Short Skill and pass a WIP Roll against an enemy trooper in ZoC (Comms Attack; can be avoided with Reset).

name: Mapping
objective: Be in Silhouette contact with scenery inside the enemy Deployment Zone, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll.

name: Nanoespionage
objective: Perform a successful BS Attack with a Medikit or GizmoKit against an enemy Specialist (no actual effect occurs).

name: Industrial Espionage
objective: Be in Silhouette contact with an enemy Engineer or an HI, REM, or TAG unit, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll with a -3 MOD.

name: HVT: Reverse Engineering
objective: Be in Silhouette contact with an enemy HVT, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll with a -3 MOD.

name: HVT: Espionage
objective: Have an enemy HVT in ZoC, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll with a -3 MOD.

name: Combat Support
objective: Restore one point of Wounds or Structure to an allied trooper using skills or kits.
note: Cannot be completed using a Peripheral (Servant).

name: Sabotage
objective: After Initiative but before Deployment, pick a scenery piece in the enemy half. Place and detonate a D-Charge on it during the game.

name: HVT: Inoculation
objective: Be in Silhouette contact with an enemy HVT, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll with a -3 MOD.

name: HVT: Kidnapping
objective: At the end of the game, the designated trooper must have a CivEvaced enemy HVT.

name: Capture
objective: At the end of the game, be in Silhouette contact with an enemy trooper who is in a Null or Immobilized state.

name: HVT: Identity Check
objective: Have an enemy HVT in ZoC and LoF, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll.

name: Net-Undermine
objective: Be inside the enemy half of the table, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll.

name: HVT: Follow-Up
objective: Have an enemy HVT in ZoC, spend a Short Skill, and pass a WIP Roll.
bonus: +3 MOD if the trooper has LoF to the HVT.
